Klein and Albena raised the cups before them and drained them at the same
time.

If you find a lamp while exploring the dungeon, you should check if it lights up
using the a command. If a dark room becomes illuminated, it's just a regular
lamp. However, if nothing happens, it's usually a magic lamp in most cases.

If you happen to pick up a magic lamp, try using the #rub command to rub it.
In most cases, a genie will appear after rubbing it a few times.

Just keep in mind that the magic lamp may have various effects depending on
whether it is blessed or cursed.

#v

Version

Commands can be used to know the current version of NetHack being played.

142

Commands—To walk through the dungeon...

block-level machine translation prototype · page 144

@

Pickup ON/OFF

NetHack in play, pressing the @ key will allow you to pick up items in the
dungeon by walking over them. (This is the pickup ON state)

And pressing the @ key again will turn pickup off, so you won't be able to pick
up items without pressing the □ key. In other words, the pickup mode will
alternate between on and off with each press of the @ key.

Having Pickup turned ON may certainly be convenient, but some items bring
disaster merely by being picked up, so it is not recommended for beginners.

$

Gold

You can know the amount of money you currently have by using the
command. However, since the amount is displayed on the play screen, you
don't need to use this command very often.

¥

List of Identified Items

By entering (¥), you can see a list of items you have discovered so far. This is
different from the i command in that you can see items you used, read, or
discarded. Sometimes, by checking this, you can guess what items with
unknown details are, so I recommend using it from time to time.

Other Symbols

143

block-level machine translation prototype · page 145

Amulets Magic-Avoidance

Welcome to Weyrdian's Decorative Items Shop. This shop sells amulets.
However, we do not handle the Yendor Amulet that customers yearn for so
much. That amulet is something only Yendor possesses deep within... Other
amulets are available here for you to purchase. We have a variety of amulets.

amulet of change

Protection from Evil

This gender-reversal amulet instantly reverses the gender of the wearer. It has
no other effects.

amulet of esp

ESP charm

A talisman that grants the ability of telepathy. When using a blindfold, you will
be able to sense the power of this talisman.

amulet of life saving

life-saving amulet

Wearing this amulet makes it possible to revive even if your hit points reach 0
and you die. However, there are cases where even it cannot save you.

amulet of reflection

Reflection Amulet

This amulet reflects the power of light-based spells and staves. It might be
considered one of the most valuable amulets in terms of value.

144

ITEMS—tools waiting for you in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 146

amulet of restful sleep

Sleep Ward

This amulet does not show much effect even when worn. However, after a
long period of time, it suddenly induces sleep in the wearer.
Strangulation amulet

amulet of strangulation

Wearing this amulet causes it to stick in your throat and attempt to suffocate
the wearer. It is often cursed and can be fatal.

amulet versus poison

Antidote Amulet

Wearing this amulet provides resistance to poison. You can remain completely
unhurt even if stung by bees or scorpion stingers.

Amulet of Yendor

Yendor's Magic Resistance

Not only does it confer no benefit on the wearer, but it also prevents
teleportation up or down floors and increases the energy required to cast
spells. It can only be obtained in the deepest layer of Yendor's dungeon.
Additionally, there seems to be a fake protection against Yendor.

Armors
What? Ah, welcome. This is Maxis's armor shop. Look, there are plenty of
helmets and armor to choose from. Of course, there might be cursed items
inside. But there could also be blessed ones or items enchanted with magic. I
don't really understand magic, but I know about the types of armor.

Armors—Armors

145

block-level machine translation prototype · page 147

Here, there's a catalog. You can compare it with our items. If you find a balance
between your budget and requirements, you should be able to find the best item.

ARMORS Armor
Armor worn on the torso. While many armors include helmets and gauntlets,
we don't treat them that way here, so sorry for the confusion.

leather armor
Leather Armor AC-2
This is so-called leather armor, made from animal hide that has been tanned
and hardened. Although it has advantages such as being quiet and very light,
its defensive power cannot be relied upon at all. However, it also has the
advantage that it is not damaged by acid or rust.

orcish ring mail

Oakish Ringmail AC-2

Rough chain mail that orcs tend to use.

ring mail

Ringmail AC-3

A suit of armor made by connecting rings of metal. While it is light for being made
of metal, there is nothing particularly notable about its defensive capabilities.

studded leather armor

Studded Leather Armor AC-3

Strengthened leather armor with iron nails. While the defense has slightly
improved due to this, it remains basically a leather armor.

scale mail

Scale mail AC-4

A leather armor with scales of metal fitted on top. It's a bit heavy, but as a
warrior, you should wear at least this level of armor.

chain mail

chain mail AC-5

A mail shirt woven in chains, reaching down to mid-thigh. Known as a ringmail.
It makes a considerable noise when moving. While its structure can prevent
being cut by swords and similar weapons, it cannot absorb the impact itself.

146

Items—tools waiting for you in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 148

LEATHER ARMOR

CHAIN MAIL

SCALE MAIL

Armors—Armors

147

block-level machine translation prototype · page 149

orcish chain mail

Oakish Chain Mail AC-5

Chain mail worn by orc warriors. As it is used by warriors, it is well-maintained,
and it doesn't look inferior to a regular chain mail when compared.

elven mithril-coat

Elven Mithril Coat AC-5

Elven-made chain mail. Although it is made from magical metal called mithril
silver, it weighs only as much as leather armor. However, its defense is equal
to chain mail, and it is also resistant to acid and rust.

dwarvish mithril-coat

Dwarvish Mithril Coat AC-6

A chain mail made of mithril crafted by dwarven smiths. Like elven mithril
coat, it is very light and has even better defense. As it is made by dwarven
warriors, it is reasonable.

Chain Mail AC-6

splint mail

A suit of armor with metal plates tightly affixed to a chainmail. While its
defensive power is higher than simple chainmail, its weight has increased
accordingly. It gives an impression of being somewhat in between chainmail
and plate mail.
Banded Mail AC-6

banded mail

A suit of armor made by stacking several sheets of metal band-like. It is quite
heavy, but its defense rating is quite good. By wearing this level of armor, you
can feel relatively safe in Yendor's dungeon.

bronze plate mail

Bronze Plate Mail AC-6

Plate mail made from bronze. While it is slightly less defensive due to the
material, it has the advantage of being resistant to corrosion.

crystal plate mail

Crystal Plate Mail AC-7

Crystal plate mail created using a method passed down to the guild said to be
on the western island. Like bronze plate mail, it has durability and its
defensive power is the same as that of a regular plate mail.
plate mail AC-7

plate mail

Chain mail covering most of the body, made by combining plates. Jointed [OCR? ...]

148

Items—tools waiting for you in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 150

PLATE MAIL

DRAGON SCALE MAIL

Armors—Armors

149

block-level machine translation prototype · page 151

It is equipped with chain mail to ensure freedom of movement. It can be
considered the strongest armor made of ordinary materials. However, it is also
heavy and quite expensive, and it may not be easy to obtain even from an
armor shop.

dragon scale mail

DragonScaleMail AC-9

A helmet said to be made from dragon scales, reportedly one of a kind. While
its defense is the highest, what is most valuable is that it is lightweight.
In addition, there is a compatibility issue, so this armor is made from scales of
only one type of dragon. And it is said that the special effects of Dragon Scale
Mail vary depending on the color of the dragon scales that form the armor.

CLOAKS Mant
A cloak to wear over armor. Even if the armor itself is made of corrosion-prone
material, as long as you cover it with the cloak, it should be quite safe. In that
sense, it might be a very important piece of equipment.

cloak of displacement

Cloak of Displacement AC-1

A mantle with magical power to bend light. The wearer may see their own
illusionary image slightly displaced from their actual position. Monsters tend to
attack this illusion first.

cloak of invisibility

Cloak of Invisibility AC-1

The wearer of this cloak will notice that their own form becomes invisible. Yes,
this cloak has a spell of invisibility sealed into it. However, its defensive power
itself cannot be relied upon.

cloak of magic resistance

Cloak of Magic Resistance AC-1

A cloak that protects against magic. It nullifies many spells used by wizards.
You will understand its value when you enter the lower levels of the dungeon.

150

Items—tools waiting for you in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 152

cloak of protection

Cloak of Protection AC-3

A mantle with much greater defensive power than a regular cloak. It boasts
defense comparable to light armor, but it's best not to forget that it is still a
mantle.

dwarvish cloak

Dwarvish Cloak AC-0

A mantle worn by dwarves with a vivid sense of color. While it may be slightly small
for humans or elves, it does not provide adequate defense until it fits properly.

elven cloak

Elvish Cloak AC-1

A cloak made by elves. With the magic to absorb sound sealed within, it allows
for silent movement (you can move without awakening sleeping monsters).

mummy wrapping

Mammy Wrapping AC-0

After defeating the mummy, this refers to the bandages left behind. There is a
rumor that if the person who equips them dies, they will turn into a mummy.

orcish cloak

Oakish Cloak AC-0

Black cloak worn by the leader of the orcs. It is purely for appearance and
offers no defense.

HELMs Armor
The most important armor to protect your head. It might be the most
important thing you have. And there are quite a few items that confer various
magic effects on your head.

dwarvish iron helm

Dwarvish Iron Helm AC-2

Dwarven helmet. Offers good defense but is somewhat heavy.

Armors——Armor

151

block-level machine translation prototype · page 153

elven leather helm

Elven Leather Helm AC-1

Elven helmet made of leather. Elaborate designs are carved throughout.

fedora

Fedora AC-1

Flared leather hat. While its defense isn't particularly high, its major
advantages include resistance to acid and rust, as well as being very light.

helmet

Helmet AC-1

An ordinary helmet. Perhaps its defining feature is that it has no special features.

helm of brilliance

Helmet of Brilliance AC-1

Once you put on this helmet, you will understand that it makes your own head smarter.
Specifically, it is a helmet that increases the intelligence and wisdom of the wearer.

152

ITEMS—tools waiting for you in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 154

helm of opposite alignment
Helmet of Opposite Alignment AC-1
Helmets that can dramatically change a character's attributes. In many cases,
they are cursed, so the changed attributes persist even after uncursing them.
Removing the helmet is necessary for the attributes to revert to their original
state.

helm of telepathy

Helmet of Telepathy AC-1

Wearing this helmet grants you the ability to read minds. Using a blindfold will
help you understand the power of this helmet.

orcish helm

Oakish Helm AC-1

Helmet used by orcs and goblins. It's quite heavy, but it provides at least
minimal defense.

SHIELDS Shields
Shields have more of a supportive role as armor. They are more useful in
melee combat rather than one-on-one battles. Still, if you don't have a
two-handed weapon, it's probably better to use a shield.

dwarvish roundshield

Dwarvish Round Shield AC-2

A medium circular shield that dwarves tend to use. It can be considered a fairly
ordinary shield.

elven shield

Elfbane Shield AC-2

An elf-made shield. It's moderately light and has decent defense. As misril
silver is used, even partially.

large shield

Large Shield AC-2

A large shield. It is about twice the size and weight of a small shield, but its
defense value has also doubled.

Armors—Armors

153

block-level machine translation prototype · page 155

orcish shield

Oakshield AC-1

Poor quality shields carried by orc minions. Not only are they poor quality, but
they also weigh a lot, so it's preferable to use other shields if possible.

shield of reflection

Shield of Reflection AC-2

A medium circular shield, but what sets it apart is that the center has been
polished into a mirror. This mirror reflects many beam attacks and nullifies
attacks made with line of sight.

small shield

Small Shield AC-1

Small shield. It is the lightest among normal shields, but its defensive value is
only moderate.

Uruk-hai shield

Uruk-Hai Shield AC-1

White shields used primarily by Urk-Hai. Even as superior types, oaks are oaks,
and their shields are quite poor quality.

LARGE SHIELD

SHIELD OF REFLECTION

154

ITEMS—tools waiting for you in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 156

BOOTS boots
Boots protect your feet... of course. But in this dungeon, there are also vicious
insects that bite and won't let go of your feet. I think they are essential. There
are even magical boots that can make your feet faster or make your footsteps
disappear.

elven boots

Elfbound Boots AC-1

Elven-made boots. Like elvish cloak, they are imbued with magic to absorb
sound, allowing you to move silently without making a sound.

fumble boots

Fumble Boots AC-1

It looks like ordinary boots at first glance. However, these boots conceal
tremendous magical power. The wearer tends to fall down frequently. In most
cases, the Fanuble Boots are cursed, making movement through the dungeon
very burdensome.

high boots

Boots AC-2

Leather boots going down to the knees. They have considerable weight, but
they provide defense commensurate with their weight.

iron shoes

Iron Shoes AC-2

A iron boot. While dwarves are known to favor it, it is quite heavy. It does have
considerable defense, though...

jumping boots

Jumping Boots AC-1

Boots that greatly increase jumping power. Should be able to jump over pits
and moats.

levitation boots

Refluent Boots AC-1

Floating boots. However, you will be unable to pickup items on the ground if
you equip these boots.

low boots

Leather Boots AC-1

boots reaching up to the ankles. These are more commonly used than sandals by adventurers.

Armors——Armor 155

block-level machine translation prototype · page 157

While it is true, the defensive effects as armor are not particularly promising.

Speed Boots AC-1

speed boots

When you equip these boots, you will notice that your movement has become
faster. Specifically, this increases your attack frequency and movement speed.

HIGH BOOTS

IRON SHOES

GAUNTLETS OF POWER

HAWAIIAN SHIRT

LEATHER GLOVES

156

Items—tools waiting for you in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 158

water walking boots

Water Walking Boots AC-1

When you equip these boots, the magic applied to the soles allows you to walk
on water. This will be handy for safely crossing moats in certain areas.

Gauntlets
gloves are things to wear on your hands. There are apparently items with magic
related to hands sealed within, but I'm a novice when it comes to magic, so I don't
really understand them.

gauntlets of dexterity

Gauntlet of Dexterity AC-1

Gloves that seal the magic to increase dexterity. The moment these gloves
are worn, the wearer becomes endowed with the highest dexterity.

gauntlets of fumbling

Gauntlet of Fanbearing AC-1

Wearing these gauntlets makes it easy to drop your weapons. In combat, they
can become a deadly item. Additionally, they are often cursed, so equipping
them even once could lead to a tragic situation.

gauntlets of power

Gloves of Power AC-1

Gloves that increase strength. You can wield strength akin to that of giants or
ogres, and can deal significant damage to enemies even when bare-handed.

leather gloves

Leather Gloves AC-1

Leather gloves. Ordinary gloves, nothing more.

Armors—Armors

157

block-level machine translation prototype · page 159

Other Armor
Hawaiian shirt is the only thing you can wear under armor for now. It's useless
but turns out to be useful. Just don't show it to the other shopkeepers though.

hawaiian shirt

Hawaiian shirt AC-0

Hawaiian shirt, aloha (is there anything else?). The only armor you can wear
under armor. If enchanted with magic, it should be quite useful. However,
there's a weakness to wearing the Hawaiian shirt in plain sight, as shopkeepers
may steal it.

Foods
Hey, welcome. This is Fortilia's grocery store. We have everything from candy
to rations to satisfy your hunger.

You're eating nothing but monsters' corpses. You should want to eat
something for humans, right? And if they're edible, I'll also buy the remains of
the monsters. So, what do you want to eat? I'll get anything you like.

apple
apple. It doesn't have much nutritional value.

banana
Banana. While bananas are noted for nutritional supplementation during exercise on the
surface, their nutritional value in the dungeon is only slightly higher than that of an apple.

158

Items—tools waiting for you in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 160

candy bar
Candy. Despite its size, it has a high nutritional value like a block of sugar.

carrot
Carrot. Rich in vitamin A and very good for the eyes. Nutritional value is low.

clove of garlic
Garlic. Some monsters strongly dislike the smell of garlic. Therefore, they will
not approach those who have it.

cram ration
Portable food. Slightly lighter than regular food, with slightly lower nutritional
value. This is also valuable in Yendor's dungeon.

C-ration
rations

cream pie
Cream pie. It has average nutrition, but you should use it by throwing it at
enemies rather than eating it.

egg
Egg. Occasionally, there are rotten eggs that are fatal if eaten. The nutritional
value is not high, so you might as well ignore it. Or you could give it to a pet
(though it will break if thrown).

Foods—Food

159

block-level machine translation prototype · page 161

food ration
Food. Nutritional value is high. However, it is very heavy and cannot be carried
in large quantities, which is a weakness.

fortune cookie
Fortune cookie. Originally, a cookie that contains a piece of paper with
fortune-telling messages in Chinese cuisine. Here, it usually contains a small
advice for the dungeon (it is not guaranteed that what is written inside is true).

K-ration
Ration. Carried by soldiers like Sergeant and Captain. Known for its
hard-to-describe subtle taste, as it occasionally comes from the military.

lembas wafer
Rambas. An elf's portable food, and a single thin cookie-like wafer provides the
nutrition of one regular meal. Very light, it can be considered an ideal meal.
However, it does not provide much satiety.

lump of royal jelly
Killer Bee(killer bee) royal jelly. The royal jelly produced in this bee's hive is
said to have special power that increases the eater's strength.

melon
Melon. While it has the highest nutritional value among fruits, the nutritional
value of fruits in general is not particularly high.

160

ITEMS—tools waiting for you in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 162

orange
Orange. Has a nutritional value similar to banana.

pancake
Pancake. It has decent nutrition, but doesn't have any particular features.

pear
Pear. Among many fruits, it has the lowest nutritional value.

slime mold
Slime mold. In NETHACK, if something is described after fruit: in the CNF file, it
refers to that fruit. Given that it is highly favored, we can acknowledge a
reasonable nutritional value, including the placebo effect.

tin
Canned foods. There are various types of canned food, and their nutritional
value varies depending on what is inside. Additionally, you might occasionally
find canned spinach, which should be very useful for adventurers.

tripe ration
Dog food. To be honest, it's not something humans should eat. You might be
able to eat it if you're extremely hungry, but you'll likely regret it.

Potions Water potions

There, welcome. Welcome to Wendy's liquor shop.
Here are the potions. From strong alcohol that dwarves can't drink to fruit
juice, they're all available. What would you like? Want to move faster? Float in
the air while adventuring? There are potions that increase your strength and
charisma. Blindness potions and confusion potions can also be used as
weapons. As long as you have gold coins, you can buy any of them. By the
way, some potions are cursed or blessed, so be careful with their effects.

Shall I buy the potions you found during your adventure? Of course, I'll pay a
good price for them.

Potions——Water Potion

161

block-level machine translation prototype · page 163

Potion of blindness

blindness potion

blindness. If thrown at an enemy, it can significantly reduce the enemy's
attack power.

Potion of booze

Alcohol

A highly alcoholic drink that is quite strong. Most users become drunk instantly,
causing temporary confusion in their minds.

Potion of confusion

confusion

Potion of confusion. Throwing it at an enemy will cause the enemy to become
confused. However, like all potions, there is a risk that the person who throws it
may inhale the smoke from the potion and become affected as well.

Potion of enlightenment

Self-judgment Potion

Instantly, you can know your own attributes. For example, you can discern
transparent objects or teleport... and so on, clearly showing what attributes
you possess.

Potion of extra healing

full healing

Hit points recover to maximum. It also seems to cure blindness (blind) and
sickness (sick). Additionally, if hit points are at maximum, the hit point limit
increases.

162

Items—tools waiting for you in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 164

Fruit juice

Fruit Juice

It can distract from hunger to some extent, but keep in mind that it will be
juice made from the fruit you specified as your favorite, so it's better not to
simply write your favorite (unless you want to drink something like "grilled
meat juice").

Strength Potion

Potion of gain ability

This potion will increase one of your six ability scores at random. None of the
ability scores except strength will increase by more than 18.

Magic Power Potion

Potion of gain energy

Increases the user's magic power (Pw). The increase is proportional to the
original magic power.
Level Increase Potion

Potion of gain level

Experience level increases by 1. However, the maximum level is 30, so it will
not increase beyond that.

Potion of hallucination

hallucination

All items and monsters in the dungeon appear to change into various other
things. Of course, even cute pets can appear as terrifying monsters. You must
be careful not to accidentally kill them.
Healing Potion

Potion of healing

A few hit points are restored, and blindness is cured regardless of cause.
Additionally, when hit points are at their highest, the maximum seems to rise
slightly.

Potion of invisibility

invisibility

can become transparent. However, the duration of remaining transparent is
unknown.

Potion of levitation

levitation

Can float in the air. Can avoid most traps and become able to defend against
attacks from certain monsters. However, you will no longer be able to pick up
any items placed on the floor.

Potions——Water Potion

163

block-level machine translation prototype · page 165

Potion of monster detection

monster detection

This potion allows you to know the position of monsters on the same floor the instant
you drink it. Of course, monsters do move around, so they may not be in the same
place.

Potion of object detection

Potion of object detection

By drinking a potion, you can know the location and type of items on the same
floor. Monsters may pick them up first.

Potion of paralysis

paralysis

If you drink this potion, your body will instantly become paralyzed. It's uncertain when
you will recover. You will also discover that this potion can be used as a weapon.

Potion of restore ability

restore ability

Restore lost ability scores for some reason. In many cases, it will be to recover
strength lost due to poison.

Potion of see invisible

see invisible

Can see through transparent creatures or creatures made transparent by magic.
Apparently, it also has the side effect of curing blindness. Tastes like fruit juice.

Potion of sickness

Poison

A ability score decreases and hit points take damage. Additionally, there is a
chance to become diseased. However, when plagued by hallucinogenic effects,
a shock seems to end the hallucinations.

164

Items—tools waiting for you in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 166

speed potion

Potion of speed

This potion doubles the speed of the drinker's movement. Consequently, the
distance traveled and the number of attacks also double. Additionally, it can
heal injured feet for some reason (such as kicking a wall or stepping on a land
mine).

Water (clear potion)

Water

Water is classified into three types. First, ordinary water. This provides a slight
cure for hunger. Next, cursed water. Immersing any item in this will curse it,
but if the character's alignment is chaotic, drinking it will restore a few hit
points. Finally, holy water. This damages demons, undead creatures, or those
with a chaotic alignment. Additionally, immersing a cursed item in holy water
can remove the curse.

Rings Rings
Welcome to Rig's Jewelry Shop.
We carry many magic rings to ensure customer satisfaction. What kind of ring
are you interested in? The Ring of Charm will greatly enhance your
attractiveness. The Ring of Strife will become more necessary the deeper you
delve into the dungeon. Of course, we also have a catalog with effects clearly
explained for your convenience. Feel free to read it.

Please note that there is one thing you should be careful about. The actual
effective magic ring is using the energy of the person wearing it. Therefore, if
you are wearing a magic ring, the consumption of energy will be high... in other
words, your hunger will increase more frequently. If you don't have any food,
it's better to take it off as much as possible.

Rings——Rings

165

block-level machine translation prototype · page 167

Alluring Ring

Ring of adornment
Wearing this ring increases the wearer's charisma immediately.

Ring of aggravate monster

Anger Ring

Wearing this ring causes more monsters to target the wearer.

Ring of cold resistance

cold ring

Wearing this ring will make you resistant to cold. You will be able to withstand
freezing rays from magic or staves, as well as breath attacks from ice dragons.
Dispute Ring

Ring of conflict

When wearing this ring and there are two or more monsters, the monsters will
start fighting each other. Additionally, the wearer's pet will also fight,
regardless of who the opponent is.

Ring of fire resistance

Fireproof Ring

A magic ring that grants fire resistance to the wearer. It protects the wearer
from magic, flames from scrolls, and other sources of fire. Even hell's lava
would not harm the wearer.

Ring of gain strength

Strength Ring

Wearing this ring increases your strength. You can carry more items and deal
more damage to enemies.

Ring of hunger

Hunger Ring

The moment this ring is worn, an immense hunger strikes. The speed at which
you become hungry doubles. And other effects are none. In most cases, it is
cursed and difficult to remove.

Ring of increase damage

Ring of Weapon Sharpness

When you wear this ring, you can hit enemies' weaknesses more accurately,
increasing the damage dealt with one strike.

Ring of invisibility

Transparent Ring

A ring that makes the wearer transparent. By becoming transparent, it should
make it easier for monsters like leprechauns and nymphs to approach.

166

Items—tools waiting for you in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 168

Ring of levitation

levitation ring

When you wear this ring, you can float. It can help avoid most traps, but you
won't be able to pickup items on the floor.

Ring of poison resistance

Antidote Ring

Ring that confers resistance to poison. While it prevents illness from eating
rotten food, you can still remain perfectly healthy after eating a corpse with
poison, like that of a kobold.

Ring of polymorph

Change Ring

Wearing this ring causes a transformation to occur suddenly with no warning. The
type of monster you transform into is random, so there is a great danger involved.

Ring of polymorph control

Ring of Teleportation

When transforming, if you wear this ring, you can control the transformation.
Shapeshifting into powerful monsters like the Red Dragon or Minotaur isn't
necessarily a bad idea.

Ring of protection

Defensive Ring

A ring that increases defense. Some can provide defense equal to chain mail,
even the highest grade ones.

Ring of protection from shape changers

Guardian Ring

Ring that prevents changes disease caused by attacks from various
poltergeist-type creatures.

Ring of regeneration

Rebirth Ring

A ring with the regeneration function that recovers 1 hit point per step taken,
but hunger increases tremendously each time you become hungry.

Rings——Ring

167

block-level machine translation prototype · page 169

Ring of searching

Exploration Ring

Ring that makes it easier to discover hidden doors and traps simply by walking.

Ring of see invisible

Transparent Revealing Ring

You can see monsters that are transparent due to magic or have transparency
as a quality.

Ring of shock resistance

Resistant Ring

A ring that can protect you from lightning-based magic and electricity traps.

Ring of stealth

Silent Foot Ring

This ring allows the wearer to enter a room with sleeping monsters without
awakening them, enabling stealth.

Ring of teleport control

Overreach Ring

A ring that allows you to choose where to teleport to when teleporting. It
seems you can also move up and down floors.

Ring of teleportation

Ring of Teleportation

Teleportation can occur suddenly with no warning. Without teleport control
ability, the destination cannot be chosen.

Ring of warning

ring of detection

This ring glows in various colors when monsters are nearby.

168

Items—tools waiting for you in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 170

Scrolls
This is Coldulyn's scroll shop. Don't underestimate scrolls. Scrolls can make or
break your adventure. Identification scrolls and anti-curse scrolls are among
the most important items in Yendor's dungeon. Charging scrolls can revive
broken staves and lamps, while scrolls of attack enhancement and defense
amplification can boost the power of weapons and armor. Got it? Scrolls are
important. So, which scroll do you want? Think carefully before you choose.

Oh, I forgot. Scrolls disappear after reading them. They consume the magic
sealed within them. But, as long as you know this, you shouldn't make a
mistake.

Scroll of amnesia

Scroll of Forgetfulness

A scroll of amnesia can even be fatal for a wizard. The moment this scroll is
read, it causes the reader to forget most of the map and many memorized
spells. For someone with little weapon attack ability who relies on magic, this
would be the worst possible situation.

Scroll of blank paper

Blank scroll

A plain sheet of parchment, nothing more. However, if you have a magic
marker (magic marker), you can create a desired scroll by writing on this
scroll.

Scroll of charging

Charging Scroll

This scroll increases the number of uses for items with limited uses, such as a
wand or magic marker. However, it can only be used once for a Wand of Wish.

Scroll of confuse monster

Scroll of Confusion

Reading this scroll causes your arms to glow red. The red light has the property of
confusing monsters. Monsters encountered immediately after reading the scroll will be
confused.

Scrolls——Papers 169

block-level machine translation prototype · page 171

you can do it.

Scroll of create monster

Summoning Scroll

You can summon several desired monsters. However, the summoned monsters
do not necessarily obey the summoner. You can also call them to serve as food
when you are hungry. Additionally, you can summon monsters with healing
powers to recover hit points.

Scroll of destroy armor

Destruction Scroll

When reading this scroll while wearing some armor, the armor will be destroyed.
This applies regardless of whether the armor is magical, blessed, or cursed.

Scroll of enchant armor

Scroll of Amplify Defense

This scroll has the power to make armor and gauntlets stronger. When read, if
the armor glows silver, it indicates an increase in defense. However, be
cautious if the scroll itself is cursed, as reading it will curse the armor itself.

Sometimes, if you try to raise your armor class too much, the armor itself may
not be able to withstand the increase and will collapse.

Scroll of enchant weapon

Scroll of Attack Power

Reading this scroll causes the weapon you are holding to glow blue. This glow
enhances the weapon's power and improves its accuracy. However, if the scroll
is cursed, it not only dulls the weapon but also seals the curse onto the weapon
itself.

Sometimes weapons have been reported to break if their attack power is
raised too much.

170

Items—tools waiting for you in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 172

Scroll of fire

Flame Scroll

This scroll sprays flame from its surface while reading the runes on it. Naturally,
this flame hurts and burns the reader, draining basic hit points. However, it also
affects surrounding monsters, so it can be used as a weapon if you have fire
resistance.

Scroll of food detection

Scroll of Food Detection

This scroll allows you to understand the locations of all food items in the level
where the reader is. Useful when you are hungry.

Scroll of genocide

Scroll of Murder

When you read this scroll, you are asked to call the name of a monster. Then,
you can clear the monster from Yendor's dungeon. However, if the scroll is
cursed, you will be surrounded by the monster you tried to kill.

Scroll of gold detection

Scroll of Detect Gold

This scroll will tell the reader the location of all gold coins on the level it is read
on. It will be valuable at the beginning of the adventure.

Scroll of identify

Identify Scroll

This scroll is undoubtedly the most important scroll among all scrolls. It reveals
the true nature of every item. By reading this scroll, you will learn what effects
a red potion has, and what abilities are hidden in a staff adorned with gems.
Everything will be laid bare in the light.

Scroll of light

Light Scroll

A scroll that emits magical light. However, if the scroll was cursed, it might be
covered by magical darkness instead.

Scroll of magic mapping

Scroll of Mapping

A scroll that allows you to send a map of the level read by magic into your
mind. It can also reveal the presence of fountains or altars in the dungeon if
they exist.

Scrolls——Papers 171

block-level machine translation prototype · page 173

Scroll of punishment

Punishment Scroll

This scroll contains the whispers of the gods. Therefore, anyone who reads this
scroll will be punished. Their ankles will be chained, and a heavy iron ball will
be hung at the end of the chain. There is no way to escape this punishment
except by removing the curse.

Scroll of remove curse

Exorcism Scroll

A scroll that can remove all curses, whether caused by angering a god, reading
a curse scroll, being able to cast cursed spells, or equipping a cursed weapon.

Scroll of scare monster

Defensive Scroll

If you place this scroll on the ground and stand on it, monsters will stop
attacking under the name of Elbereth. Additionally, if you recite the runes
written on this scroll, the monsters will flee by the name of Elbereth.

Scroll of taming

Scroll of Friendship

This scroll calms monsters near the reader. It also soothes an angry
shopkeeper, possibly because something has been stolen.

Scroll of teleportation

Scroll of Transcendence

This scroll allows the reader to move beyond space. However, it is never certain
that they will transfer to their desired location.

172

ITEMS—tools waiting for you in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 174

Spellbooks
Hello, welcome to Yander's Rare Book Shop. Ah, we deal in spellbooks here.
The catalog is available, but I can't guarantee the contents of the books. Why?
Well, I can't read Runes. But I can guarantee that all the books here are
spellbooks. You may not be able to read their contents, but you can tell they
contain Runes just by looking at them.

What will you buy then? Or do you want to see the catalog? Well, okay then.
Here, this is the catalog of magic books. It also has a brief description of the
spells. Supposedly classified by earth wizards.

Spellbook of cancellation

Magic Drain Magic Level 7

This spell has the power to nullify magic. When used on oneself, it can remove
curses from items but also turns blessed items and magically sharpened
weapons into ordinary ones. Additionally, it can steal the magical effects of
living beings (such as a leprechaun's teleportation ability).

Spellbook of cause fear

Bestow Terror Magic Level 3

Spell that causes panic in monsters. Monsters will try to flee from the one who
cast this spell as quickly as possible if they fall into fear.

Spellbook of charm monster

Enchantment Magic Level 3

This spell charms monsters and makes them submit peacefully. Even the
fiercest monsters will behave like the caster's friend as soon as the spell takes
effect.

Spellbook of clairvoyance

Superior Sight Magic Level 3

This spell allows you to see the terrain around your character for a certain
distance. Even if it's outside a room or a corridor, you can see the presence of
monsters.

Spellbook of cone of cold

Freezing Ray Magic Level 5

Cast a freezing ray from your finger. Has resistance to ice spells.

Spellbook——Magic Book

173

block-level machine translation prototype · page 175

There are many items, but since some dislike ice, you should choose who to
use them on carefully.
Confusion Magic Level 2

Spellbook of confuse monster

When cast on a monster, this spell causes the monster to become confused.
It's uncertain what actions it will take, but it will likely attack less frequently.

Spellbook of create familiar

Summon Familiar Magic Level 6

Summon a familiar. Unlike create monster, it will be treated like a pet and will
not be attacked.

Spellbook of create monster

Monster Summoning Magic Level 2

This spell will summon a monster next to the caster. However, the likelihood of
the monster being friendly is very low. Instead, note that most monsters can
be eaten after they are defeated.

Spellbook of cure blindness

Blindness Restoration Magic Level 2

Recite this spell when blinded, whether by drinking a potion or any other
cause, to restore your sight.

Spellbook of cure sickness

Heal Disease Magic Level 3

When you get a disease, such as from eating rotten food, it can sometimes be
fatal. In such cases, casting this spell will help. The disease will disappear from
your body immediately.

174

Items—tools waiting for you in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 176

Spellbook of detect food

Food Detection Magic Level 2

Display all food items in the floor with the wizard. Very useful when you are
hungry.

Spellbook of detect monsters

Monster Detection Magic Level 1

Display the locations of all monsters on floors with wizards, including their
types.

Spellbook of detect treasure

Item Detection Magic Level 4

Display all items on the same level as the caster. This also shows the general
type of each item, which is handy when you want to pick up weapons or armor.

Spellbook of detect unseen

Invisible Detection Magic Level 3

This spell will allow you to see invisible creatures for a while. It should be used
when attacked by transparent monsters.

Spellbook of dig

Dig Magic Level 5

When this spell is cast, the dungeon wall crumbles and a passage is created. It
can also be used on boulders, turning a boulder into countless small stones.

Spellbook of extra healing

Full Healing Magic Level 3

This spell recovers a significant amount of hit points. It is recommended when
healing isn't sufficient.

Spellbook of finger of death

Death Touch Magic Level 7

When the wizard casts this spell, a beam of death rays emanates from his
fingertips. If the target monster or person cannot withstand it, they will die.
However, if they can endure it, nothing will happen.
Fireball Magic Level 4

Spellbook of fireball

Fireballs erupt from the wizard's hand and spread, becoming a large fireball to
attack the enemy. A representative offensive spell.
Force Blast Magic Level 1

Spellbook of force bolt

Spell that emits force field from hand, dealing damage. The damage dealt is
small, and it may be avoided by the enemy, but it consumes little mana.

Spellbook—Magic Book

175

block-level machine translation prototype · page 177

Spellbook of genocide

Massacre Mage Level 7

This spell can completely exterminate an entire race from Yendor's dungeon.
When using this spell, it is necessary to engrave the name of the race you wish
to massacre accurately.

Spellbook of haste self

Accelerate Magic Level 3

This spell can double the caster's movement speed, number of attacks, and similar
abilities. It is used in combat or when facing creatures that are too fast to catch.

Spellbook of healing

Heal Magic Level 1

This spell recovers some hit points for the caster. It is quite useful right after
entering the dungeon, but it is not very helpful in the deeper levels where
severe injuries are common and cannot be fully healed by this spell.

Spellbook of identify

Identify Magic Level 5

Identify items of unknown quality. Similar to scrolls, but spells can be cast to
identify them, making spells more convenient to use.

Spellbook of invisibility

Transparency Magic Level 4

When this spell is cast, the caster's body becomes transparent. The items the
caster is holding also become transparent, but once dropped, they will no
longer be transparent.

Spellbook of knock

Unlock Magic Level 1

This spell can unlock doors and large chests that are locked. Provided the
incantation doesn't fail, it can be opened without the risk of failure regardless
of what key is used.

Spellbook of levitation

levitate magic level 4

Reciting the "Levitate" spell allows the caster to walk in mid-air. In Yendor's
dungeon, most traps are triggered by stepping on the floor. This spell can be
considered the best way to avoid triggering traps. However, keep in mind that
you cannot pick up items while the Levitate spell is active.

176

Items—tools waiting for you in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 178

Spellbook of light

Magic Level 1

Once this spell is cast, it can illuminate a room sealed in darkness. The light
from this magic will continue to shine without fading.

Spellbook of magic mapping

Map Detection Magic Level 5

This caster will have a clear impression of the map of the level where the
caster is. They can also know about the existence of altars and fountains.
Magic Arrow Magic Level 2

Spellbook of magic missile

A spell that produces and shoots light arrows. A basic attack spell, and
mastering this spell serves as a sign that a magic user has become proficient.
Shapeshift Magic Level 6

Spellbook of polymorph

This spell changes the caster or monster into a different form. However, if you
cast a polymorph spell on yourself, you may turn into a goblin or kobold unless
you can control the transformation in some way. Therefore, caution is
necessary when using this spell.

Spellbook of remove curse

Exorcise — magic level 5

Remove curses from items. Can help to drop weapons that won't leave your
hand or armor you can't remove.

Spellbook of restore ability

Ability score recovery Magic level 4

A spell to recover ability scores reduced by poison or the wrath of a god.

Spellbook—Magic Book

177

block-level machine translation prototype · page 179

Spellbook of sleep

Sleep Spell Level 1

This spell emits a sleep ray from the caster's fingertips. If this spell works,
most monsters will become allies instead of enemies.
Spellbook of slow monster

Slow Magic Level 2

A spell that reduces the speed of monsters by half. It has the opposite effect of
haste self, so it may be useful in some cases instead of haste self.
Spellbook of teleport away

Teleportation Magic Level 6

This is a spell that teleports yourself or monsters you are fighting. It might be a
good idea to use this spell to temporarily escape combat when your hit points
are extremely low.
Spellbook of turn undead

Unholy Purification Magic Level 6

Spell that induces panic in creatures that possess the root of their life and
causes them to flee from the caster. Equivalent to the purification power a
cleric possesses, and in some cases, it can even destroy them.
Spellbook of wizard lock

Magic Lockpick Magic Level 2

A spell to lock doors by magic. Unfortunately, its power is not great, and it can
be easily picked without much difficulty.

Tools Misc
Welcome to Deety's General Store. Oh, have we met somewhere before? Why,
this is your second visit? Well, that's quite all right. What can I get for you
today? We carry everything from food to Excalibur. Although Excalibur has
been out of stock recently, we hope to have it back soon.

Still, we're the only ones dealing with various trinkets and tools! Some of them
might be useful for your adventure, so please take a look. If you just want to
enjoy the sights, it's free.

178

Items—tools waiting for you in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 180

bag of holding

Bag of Holding

A magic bag that won't exceed a certain weight no matter how many items
you stuff into it. A desirable item for adventurers.

bag of tricks

Bag of Tricks

A mysterious bag that spawns monsters each time it is used. It's important to note that it
can be difficult to distinguish from the Bag of Holding without using identify magic.
Eye Shield

blindfold

Sleep mask-like eye cover. It would be particularly useful if you have telepathy
ability.

bugle

tripmine

Bugle. It's best not to blow it on the floor where the barracks are located.
Additionally, knowing a certain scale can be very helpful in some places.

chest

drawer

Usually found lying around in the dungeon, you can pick it up if you want to carry it,
but there's no particular advantage to carrying it due to its great weight.

credit card

Credit Card

A plastic card. Useful for picking locks by inserting it into gaps in cabinets or
doors.

crystal ball

Crystal Ball

A crystal ball polished into a true circle by magic. By looking into the center of
this crystal ball, one can discern the locations of various objects such as food,
monsters, gold coins, and other items.

drum

Drum

Other musical instruments can also wake up sleeping monsters. Additionally,
monsters seem to be afraid of the sound of drums for some reason.

drum of earthquake

Drum of Earthquake

When you hit this drum, an earthquake of a magnitude corresponding to the
character's skill will occur. In some cases, it may create several pits.

Tools——Tools

179

block-level machine translation prototype · page 181

CREDIT CARD

BAG OF HOLDING

DRUM OF EARTHQUAKE

expensive camera

Expensive Camera

A expensive camera. As expected, it comes equipped with a flash, so you can
blind monsters by setting it off.

figurine

Figures

Small statues. Using these statues will summon the same monster as the
statue, which will become a obedient pet for the character. So if it's a red
dragon statue, a red dragon will be summoned, and if it's a nymph statue, a
nymph will appear as a pet.

fire horn

Fire Horn

When this horn is blown, flames burst from its tip. Of course, it can be used as
a powerful weapon.

flute

Flute

Playing a certain melody at a certain place can be useful. Additionally, if the
player is skilled, they can calm snakes.

180

ITEMS—tools waiting for you in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 182

FIGURINE

frost horn

Frost Horn

Blowing this horn forcefully causes a freezing ray to emit from the tip. It can be
used to freeze water or defeat monsters.
Harp

harp

There is an effect that can tame mischievous fairies, but you will need to be
dexterous to do so.
Horn

horn

Blows will wake up sleeping monsters on the same level. Additionally, this horn
plays a sound that scares monsters.
Ice Box

ice box

Corpse of a monster is prone to decay, except for certain ones. However, if you
store it in this icebox, you can prevent decay. Note that this box itself is very
heavy, so those without strength may not even be able to carry it.

Tools—Tools

181

block-level machine translation prototype · page 183

key

Key

Various keys. The type is indicated on the held portion.

lamp

Lamp

Use it to brighten dark rooms. It has no other effects.

large box

box

Like a sack, it can store items. However, it doesn't seem to have much
advantage in carrying due to its considerable weight.

leash

reins

You can start carrying your pet. This means you can treat your pet like an
item. Even if you trigger a teleport trap, your pet will teleport along with you.

lockpicking tool

lock pick

It can open locked doors and large chests. Many thieves prefer this lockpick
set over credit cards or master keys, relying on their own skill.
Magic Flute

magic flute

The soothing sound of the Magic Flute puts many monsters to sleep.

182

ITEMS—tools waiting for you in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 184

magic harp

Magic Harp

Regardless of the minstrel's skill, most monsters become enchanted by the
sound of the magic harp.

magic lamp

Magic Lamp

A magic lamp. Of course, when rubbed, a spirit (djinni) will appear, and in
many cases, grant your wish.

magic marker

Magic Marker

It becomes easier to carve messages into the dungeon floor. It also has the
ability to write a desired spell onto a blank scroll. Because it uses magic ink, it
can write anywhere and the writing does not easily fade.

magic whistle

Magic Whistle

Magic flute. If you have a pet, you will likely see it teleport next to you the
instant you blow it.

mirror

Mirror

Mirror. Some monsters seem to hate their own ugly appearance and avoid
mirrors. They may also be effective against monsters that attack with gaze.

Tools—Tools

183

block-level machine translation prototype · page 185

Pickaxe

pick-axe

This is a pickaxe. It can open holes in walls and break rocks. It can also be used
as a weapon, but if you have another weapon, I recommend using that instead.
It is quite heavy, so unless you are very confident in your strength, carrying it
around will be difficult.

sack

Sack

A character can carry a maximum of 52 items. However, by using a sack, you
can store more items, allowing you to carry more than 52.

skeleton key

key

Magic key. It can automatically detect the shape of a lock and change its own shape.

Stethoscope

stethoscope

Using on monsters or pets allows you to know detailed information about the
target. If they are sick or confused, you can even know their symptoms. It is
standard equipment for a healer.

184

Items—tools waiting for you in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 186

tinning kit

Can opener

A machine that can canjar monsters. Canjars won't rot, so they're very useful.
However, note that this tool is heavy.
can opener

tin opener

A magical tool that easily opens cans which normally take considerable time to open.

whistle

Flute

Blowing this flute will cause the pet to start moving toward that location.
However, other monsters will also become aware of the location where the
flute was blown, so be cautious.

Wands Staffs
Hello, good to see you. Welcome to Dax's Spoon Staff Shop. What can I get for
you? Even if you're not into magic, these items will give you a taste of being a
wizard. There might even be a Wish Wand that can give you any item. Anyway,
take your time browsing. Oh, and be careful with the Null Wand. It has no
power at all.

wand of magic extraction

Wand of cancellation

Wand that nullifies magic power to disable magical properties. Monsters
pointed at by this wand lose their special abilities. For example, it can disable a
leprechaun's teleportation ability.
wand of monster summoning

Wand of create monster

Summon monsters. It might be useful when you don't have food.
Ice Wand

Wand of cold

Discharge freezing ray. When the ray hits a monster, it can deal significant
damage.

Wands—Staff

185

block-level machine translation prototype · page 187

Deadly Wand

Wand of death

Emit a beam of death rays. All living creatures in the direction of the beam will
die. However, creatures resistant to death rays will take no damage.

Wand of digging

Digging Pickaxe

You can dig holes in the dungeon. It can also be an effective attack against
monsters that envelop and attack characters.
Flame Wand

Wand of fire

This scepter produces fiery serpents from its tip, which can deal damage to
many monsters.
Light Wand

Wand of light

Staff that produces glowstones. Other than illuminating dark rooms, it has no
other use.

Wand of lightning

Thunderbolt Wand

A rod that discharges lightning. Since monsters with resistance to electricity are
relatively few, it will be an effective means against most monsters.

Wand of locking

Wand of Unlocking

You can lock keys on doors, cabinets, large chests, and so on.

Wand of magic missile

Magic Arrow Wand

A staff that seals away the loss of magic. While its power is not great, it is
suitable for dealing sure damage.

Wand of make invisible

Transparent Wand

Swinging this spoon staff at monsters will make them transparent. In other
words, using it on yourself allows you to become transparent.

Wand of nothing

Void Wand

A staff with no effects.

Wand of opening

pick lock wand

can open locked doors and chests.

Wand of polymorph

Wand of polymorph

Change monsters or pets, or oneself. Also, transform items.

186

Items—tools waiting for you in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 188

By swinging, you can transform any item into another item.
Identifying Wands

Wand of probing

When swung at monsters or pets, you can see characteristics such as hit
points and gold.
Exploration Wand

Wand of secret door detection

In the room, swinging this staff will reveal a secret door. As expected, there
will be no reaction if there is no secret door.
Sleeping Wand

Wand of sleep

Swinging this spoon staff at monsters puts them to sleep. Note that this does
not work on monsters with resistance to sleep.

Wand of slow monster

Blunt Wand

Cast a spell to blunt the monster's magic, halving its movement speed and
attack frequency.
Speed wand

Wand of speed monster

Double the target's movement speed and attack frequency. Of course, the
character can use it as well.
Blowpipe

Wand of striking

Swinging at monsters deals some damage. It can also be used to destroy rocks
(boulder).

Wands——Targe Staff

187

block-level machine translation prototype · page 189

Dimensional Leap Wand

Wand of teleportation

Teleport to another part of the same level. If you have Teleport Control, you
can choose where to teleport.
Holy Wand

Wand of undead turning

It has the effect of driving away creatures that belong to the realm of death. It
is also said to have the power to reanimate corpses.

Wand of wishing

Wish Wand

Swinging this wand will cause one item to appear. However, it's best to avoid
wishing for a Wand of wishing.

Weapons
Good to see you! This is the clay giant's weapon shop. They deal with
everything from swords to one arrow. I'll buy your unwanted weapons at a
good price. So, what do you want?

SWORDS Swords

Knightly pride would put a sword in the hand of a samurai, thinking it the soul
of a weapon. A warrior would likely make it their main weapon. Most are
one-handed. It's also possible to increase defense by holding a shield in the
other hand.

Broad Sword

broadsword

This is the typical sword we imagine when we hear the word "sword." It is basic
equipment for knights. Its blade is about 1 to 1.5 meters long. Compared with
a longsword, its distinctive feature is its fairly broad blade.

dwarvish short sword

Dwarvish Shortsword

Dwarves are too short to use long swords or spears.
188

Items—tools waiting for you in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 190

He prefers shortswords. However, if he were truly combat-oriented, he would
use an axe.

elven broadsword

Elven Broadsword

An elf-made sword. The scabbard and hilt are adorned with intricate designs.
Additionally, due to their delicate craftsmanship, the damage dealt to
monsters is slightly greater than that of a regular broadsword.

elven short sword

Elven Shortsword

A elf-made shortsword. Like a broadsword, it is sharper, though only slightly,
compared to ordinary ones.

katana

Katana

Samurai sword, a katana considered to house the souls of mysterious warriors
from the east. Despite its slender form, it is extremely sturdy due to a special
steel-making process, and its power far exceeds that of broadswords or
longswords.

short sword

Short Sword

A sword somewhat shorter than a longsword, favored by thieves who prefer maneuverable
weapons and by races whose build prevents them from using long swords.

long sword

Longsword

Longsword. Soldiers and skilled warriors prefer it because it can be wielded
one-handed, allowing them to hold a shield in their other hand to defend
themselves.

two-handed sword

Two-handed Sword

Two-handed sword. Preferred by berserkers for its brute force. More of a
weapon to bash with the weight of the sword rather than slash.
Simmit

scimitar

Pirate sword. Can be slashed simply by swinging normally, making it easy to
maneuver. It is also said that orcs and ogres prefer this weapon.

orcish short sword

Ochish Shortsword

Short sword used by lower-level goblins. It has many chipped blades and poor
material quality, with damage dealt being negligible.

Weapons—Weapons189

block-level machine translation prototype · page 191

KATANA

SHORT SWORD

SCIMITAR

TWO-HANDED SWORD

190

Items—tools waiting for you in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 192

DAGGERS Short Sword

It's better to consider a dagger as secondary armor rather than primary, as it's
easy to throw, so you won't lose out by having a few on hand.

athame

Assam

Short sword used by mages. Cast from very hard material, it does not chip.
Easy to handle, but the power is negligible.

crysknife

Chris Knife

A knife with a blade length of about 20 centimeters made of meteoric iron. Its power and
sharpness are said to match those of a great sword due to the magic contained within it.

dagger

Dagger

Short sword with a blade length of about 20 centimeters.

elven dagger

Elven Dagger

A beautifully decorated short sword crafted by elves. Used by races like
hobbits who are too short to use swords effectively.

knife

Knife

A knife. (Is there anything else you can think of?) It's one of the weapons you
should throw rather than hold.

orcish dagger

Oakhish Dagger

Short sword used by orcs. It's likely the most readily available weapon in
Yendor's dungeon. The power speaks for itself.

scalpel

Witch

It is a surgical knife for medical use. It is a weapon that healers start with, but I
should note that you should switch to another weapon as soon as possible.
Armpit Knife

wakizashi

Short sword A short sword used as an auxiliary weapon by warriors on the isolated
eastern island. Although a short sword, it possesses considerable power.

Weapons—Weapons191

block-level machine translation prototype · page 193

STAFFS Staves
A club is used by spellcasters without vitality. Or it seems that clumsy humans
without skill in refined weapons like swords or spears, and ogres, use clubs.

Acris

aklys

Club reinforced with wound wire or sharp metal pieces. Often used by ogres.

Club

club

A wooden short rod. It can deal decent damage if you have good strength, but
it's not suitable as a main weapon.

flail

Weak

Developed from farming tools, this weapon consists of a staff connected by
chains or metal rings at the grip and the part that strikes the enemy. It utilizes
centrifugal force, allowing even those without strength to deliver significant
power.

192

Items—tools waiting for you in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 194

Mace

mace

Iron staff. The striking part is knobby and spikes have been added to this part
to increase its power. Known as a mace.

morning star

Morningstar

A ball and chain, with a club connected by a chain. It can be considered to
have the highest power as a weapon for striking. Such a name was given
because the spiked ball appears like a lantern.

quarterstaff

Quarterstaff

Wooden staff. A staff that many mages prefer to wield. However, the school of
staff combat uses this staff to confuse and fight enemies.

Weapons—Weapons193

block-level machine translation prototype · page 195

AXES Axes
A weapon for knocking down an opponent who isn't wearing armor. Many are
useful for everyday life as well.

axe

axe

axe. It can sometimes have the same power as a sword or even greater.

dwarvish mattock

Dwarvish Mattock

A pickaxe-shaped axe. It boasts tremendous power when swung forcefully by
short-statured dwarves.
Warhammer

war hammer
A hammer with a sharpened tip. Not a huge sledgehammer.

194

Items—tools waiting for you in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 196

SPEARS SPEARS
It can be used as a throwing spear and also works for close combat, making it
a versatile weapon. Its power is decent, and it's not particularly heavy, so
carrying it as a secondary weapon isn't a bad idea.

dwarvish spear

Dwarvish Spear

A luminous spear crafted by dwarves. It boasts the highest attack power
among spears due to its spearhead being made of mithril silver.

elven spear

Elven Spear

Elven-made spear. Runes are engraved from the handle to the tip.

javelin

Javelin

Thin spear. Basically made for throwing and unsuitable for melee combat.

Lance

lance

lance. While it is commonly used for charge attacks by mounted warriors,
lances are not exclusive to cavalry.

orcish spear

Oakish Spear

Black spear. Like other orcs' weapons, its power is slightly inferior to other
spears.
Spear

spear

Basic spear. The length varies but spears are called so for those about 1.5
meters or 2 meters long.

trident

Trident

Tripartite spear. Originally used for catching fish in water. Ease of handling
can be considered a feature.

Weapons—Weapons195

block-level machine translation prototype · page 197

BOW & ARROWS
A bow shoots arrows, and a crossbow shoots bolts. Both arrows and bolts can
be thrown by hand, but the power when shot from a bow is negligible
compared to when shot from a crossbow. Arrows are indeed meant to be shot
from a bow.

bow

arrow

To use for shooting arrows. It can be said to have the greatest power against
small creatures. Additionally, while in melee combat, you can use a bow as a
weapon to strike enemies, though this is not recommended.

196

Items—tools waiting for you in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 198

orcish bow

Oakish Bow

Shortbow, which orcs prefer to use. Among the three types of bows, it has the
weakest power. Due to the poor quality common to items made by orcs.

elven bow

Elven Bow

A bow made by elves. Fine runes are engraved on it, increasing its power
above that of an ordinary bow.
arrow

arrow

An ordinary arrow. It can also be thrown, but its power is considerably weaker
than when shot from a bow.

silver arrow

Silver Arrow

Arrows tipped with silver or silver-plated. Silver, which possesses holy power, is
effective against monsters such as demons and ghosts.

Weapons—Weapons197

block-level machine translation prototype · page 199

orcish arrow

Oakish Arrow

Black arrows crafted by the artisans of the orcs. They are quite inferior
compared to other arrows.

elven arrow

Elven Arrow

Arrows made by an elf craftsman. Runes are also engraved on these.

crossbow

Crossbow

Crossbow. It consists of a wooden stock at a right angle to a bow, unlike a
regular bow which is held differently when shooting. Its power greatly exceeds
that of a bow, but its weakness is that rapid firing is impossible.

crossbow bolt

Crossbow bolt

Arrows for crossbows. Also known as quorl. While you can throw them, it's
much better to use a crossbow.

Pole Arms
A polearm with an axe or spear attached to a long staff. It can't be used
one-handed, so you can't use a shield at the same time, which is its biggest
weakness. However, it does have considerable power.

bardiche

Bardiche

A large axe-like weapon commonly used in northern empires. It is basically
used like an axe.
Bek·de·Corban

bec de corbin

A warhammer with a long handle named after a bird's beak. It was commonly
used in the eastern subcontinent.
Bil-Gizzarum

bill-guisarme
A gizaram with a pick-like beak.

fauchard

Foshall

scythe carried by a reaper depicted in art. Often has a hook.

198

ITEMS—tools waiting for you in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 200

glaive

Grave

A spear with a knife-like blade attached to the tip. Known as a naginata in the
eastern islands, it is commonly used as an armament by women and girls.
Gizrum

guisarme

A type of grue. Its blade is larger and more curved than a grue's blade. It often
has a hook on the reverse side.

halberd

Halberd

Polearm combining a spearhead with an axe. Can be used for slashing,
thrusting, and sweeping.

lucern hammer

Lutzel Hammer

A type of long pickaxe. May be the same as the bork cloven in some locations.

Weapons—Weapons199

block-level machine translation prototype · page 201

as it is sometimes treated.
Partisan

partisan

Polearm. A typical partisan has a fan-like blade protruding from the base of the
spearhead.
Lancer

ranseur

A weapon with a long pole to which a very long, thin blade is attached. In
many cases, two blades protrude horizontally from the base of the blade.
Spectre

spetum

A spear with a very long handle. An effective weapon against giant enemies.

Viz

voulge

A pole with an axe-like blade attached to the end. It's primarily an instrument
for sweeping, but it can also be used for thrusting.

200

Items—tools waiting for you in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 202

OTHERS
A weapon that doesn't fit within the scope I've talked about before. Well, there are many
items with various characteristics, so there might be something usable depending on the
situation.

Throwing axe

boomerang

Thrown weapon that the indigenous people of the southern continent prefer. If
your dexterity is high, it will return to your hand if you miss the target.

bullwhip

Whip

Whip made by weaving animal skin. Its advantage is that it is light, but the
damage dealt is negligible.

dart

darts

It's larger than darts meant for gameplay. You can fight with it, but throwing it
might be more convenient.

rubber hose

Horse

Rubber hose. Its purpose is not well understood.

shuriken

shuriken

Throwing star (star-shaped throwing knife) that samurai warriors from the East
are said to prefer.
Slingshot

sling

A weapon to throw stones around. The usage is the same as arrows, but the
power is not particularly great.

BOOMERANG

DART

Weapons—Weapons201

block-level machine translation prototype · page 203

worm tooth

Worm Teeth

Longworm fang. Strong against acid and rust, so it might be useful against
monsters with those resistances. A two-handed weapon.

Named Weapons
Weapons granted by the gods or sleeping in some corner of this dungeon.
They are wonderful weapons, each named due to their excellence. After all,
you've probably heard of some of them before.

Cleaver

Excalibur

A axe with a great blade. Details are unknown, but it is known to have chaotic
attributes.

Demonbane

Demon Slayer Sword——Demonevein

Longsword. It deals maximum damage against demons. This sword was forged
by a smith who lost his beloved family to demons, at the cost of his own life.

Dragonbane

Dragonslayer sword——Dragoneer

Great sword made to boast great power only against dragons and to slay their
wyrm spawn.

Excalibur

Excalibur

Legendary sword said to be granted only to those recognized by the Lady of the
Holy Spring. It is said that the wielder becomes possessed of unparalleled power.

Fire brand

Flame Sword——Firebrand

Longsword with a blade wrapped in flame. The wielder of this sword will gain
resistance to fire.

Frost brand

Frost Brand——Frostbrand

Longsword with a blade always frosted and transparent like ice. A wielder of
Frost Brand gains resistance to cold by this sword's magic.

202

ITEMS——tools that await you in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 204

STORMBRINGER

Giantslayer

FIRE BRAND

FROST BRAND

EXCALIBUR

Giant Slayer sword

Long sword said to possess great power against giants, Minotaur, Owlbear, and
other giant creatures.

Grimtooth

Grimtooth

Short sword said to be forged from the teeth of Grim, a hero among oaks. It
lacks distinctive features but is very easy to use.

Mjollnir

Minyoil——Toll Hammer

Warhammer that can emit lightning. There is a rumor that it returns to your
hand after being thrown, but its truth is unknown.

Ogresmasher

Owagadestroyer—Ouwaga Smasher

Warhammer forged with the sole aim of defeating an ogre. Hammer powered by the force of sunlight.

203
Weapons——Weapons

block-level machine translation prototype · page 205

Because its power is sealed within it in a manner different from the Sun Sword,
it seems to boast tremendous power against ogres.

Orcrist

Bite Round——Ork List

This greatsword, called Orcrist among elves and Biter among orcs, is feared by
orcs. It is a famous blade that has cut down hundreds of orcs.

Snickersnee

Snack Snie

If you are a Samurai, this famous blade is something you dream of holding at least
once. Anything that touches this katana will be severed, no matter what it is.

Sunsword

Sandsword

A sword imbued with the power of life—its blade sealed with the glow of the sun. It is
natural for a being with its origin in the realm of life to boast supreme power against
those in the domain of death.
Piercing Blade

Sting

A short sword made by elves, which a hero like Bilbo or some other hobbit hero
possessed. It shows great power against orcs and emits light in advance to
warn the holder of the danger it intends to inflict.

Stormbringer

Stormbringer

This sword drains the vitality of those who touch its blade, leaving them to
vanish. It is said that the first person to wield this sword sustained their own
life by feeding on the vitality stolen with the sword, but the truth of this is
uncertain.

Trollsbane

Trollbane

Morningstar created to crush trolls. The striking part is covered in mithril silver
to injure the trolls.
Wearbane

Werebane

Long sword for hunting shapechangers. Some swords are said to clang their blades
to alert their wielder to the presence of shapechangers, but this is uncertain.

204

ITEMS——tools waiting for you in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 206

Text

These monsters mentioned here are described as aberrant creatures believed
to lurk in Yendor's dungeon. They include those summoned to Yendor for the
protection of amulets, those that have taken up residence in Yendor's dungeon
from somewhere else, and those that have become lost and mixed in due to
the distortion of dimensions caused by Yendor's excessive magic power.

After many years of research by several scholars, this comprehensive
"Dungeon Ecology Guide" has finally been compiled into a single book. This
tome is being sold for 1000 zmarks each to adventurers who wish to enter the
dungeons of Yendor. Here, we present a transcript containing only the
information deemed important from this book.

However, the monsters listed here are not all the demons lurking in Yendor's
dungeon. Additionally, not everything described here is necessarily true. You
must see for yourself by venturing into Yendor's dungeon.

Editor/Ceridia Foren

Monsters Introduction

205

block-level machine translation prototype · page 207

PageHeader

ape, carnivorous ape

The ape is a giant primate that can reach several meters in body length. Because
it is originally omnivorous, it may attack adventurers and eat their flesh.

Hylla is often led by a boss in a group. So, even if you defeat one, there may
be several more behind it. Be cautious against such opponents when your hit
points are low. It's better to avoid fighting in open areas and instead lure
them to narrow spaces. However, Hylla's weapons are weak claws apart from
its teeth, so for adventurers with adequate equipment, they should not pose
a significant threat.

Additionally, the carnivorous ape is a particularly aggressive variant of the
ape that has become largely carnivorous after a long period of meat
consumption, resulting in increased ferocity and a body size nearly twice that
of a regular ape. Those living in Yendor's dungeon seem to particularly enjoy
eating human flesh, so adventurers should be cautious. However, they tend
to act more as solitary creatures rather than in groups, making them
somewhat easier to defeat compared to regular apes.

Yender's monsters include some quite tasty hog meat, at least dozens of
times better than goblin meat.
Bat

bat, giant bat, vampire bat

Bat dwelling in the dark dungeons of Yendor. Although those dungeons were
created by Yendor and its subordinates, they seem to have taken up
residence on the surface over time.
They will lunge at you with their small fangs once they spot these impolite
intruders, trying to defend their territory. However, they lack substantial
strength, so they can be easily repelled. Nevertheless, the behavior of bats
lacks consistency, so you should pay particular attention to that aspect. They
may approach and then retreat, making it difficult to aim at them.
Additionally, vampire bats are basically the same as giant bats, but they have
potent venom in their fangs. According to rumors, there is also a theory that
vampire bats are the form taken by vampires when they transform. This is
regarding the nature of vampire bats.

206

MONSTERS—monsters in the dungeon

block-level machine translation prototype · page 208

It is clear that the rumor arose because its healing of wounds is faster than that of other bats.

Centaur

plain centaurs, forest~, mountain~

Centaur is a half-human, half-horse archer. While the typical centaur has a
horse's lower body, there are also centaurs found with only the hind legs as
horse legs, making them quadrupedal. This might be some kind of deformity.

In some areas, there are Leo Kentauri with lower bodies of lions. There are
also Ono Kentauri with lower bodies of donkeys. Occasionally, there are even
Draconic Kentauri, which are half-human, half-dragon. To distinguish these
rare breeds, the original Kentauri are sometimes called Hippocentauri.
In the Yendorian dungeon, reports of the existence of plain centaurs that
dwell in grasslands, forest centaurs that dwell in forests, and mountain
centaurs that dwell in mountains have been made.
Kentauros was supposed to be a creature that loved nature, but it is not clear
why it came to dwell in Yendor's dungeon.
Their main weapon is the bow and arrow, but they also deliver powerful kicks
from their horse's hooves in close combat. If you defeat them, you can pick
up a longbow and about five dozen arrows.

Dragon

unknown? (unknown?)

Dragons (Dragon) are not legendary beings born in children's bedtime
stories. Already, several types of dragons have been confirmed in the
deepest levels of Yendor's dungeon. However, those who survive encounters
with them are extremely few, and even those who do survive tend not to
speak of their existence out of fear. Therefore, very little information is
known about them.

First, the type of dragon can be identified by the color of its scales. And
depending on the color of the scales, the breath of the dragons changes.
This is called "dragon breath," which involves exhaling concentrated acid or
toxic gas, freezing liquid, and so on. So far, the abilities of dragons confirmed
are limited to this.
Strong claws and fangs are said to pierce even plate mail. Detailed abilities [OCR? ...]

Bat, Knight, Dragon

207

block-level machine translation prototype · page 209

vampire bat

centaurs

fire elemental

dragon

carnivorous ape

block-level machine translation prototype · page 210

This indicates a high necessity for future research.
They are also confirmed to be oviparous. Young dragons newly hatched from
eggs are rarely found in deeper levels, possibly unable to survive the fierce
competition for survival. Young dragons cannot breathe fire and are often
driven back by adventurers who rely on their claws for combat. The scarcity
of dragon growth stages might be due to this.
A sword forged solely to slay dragons is waiting somewhere in Yendor's
dungeon, asleep and awaiting its wielder.
Elemental (Spirit) water elemental, fire elemental, earth elemental, air elemental

Elementals mean the elements of this world: fire, water, air, and earth. In
this case, however, elementals are not merely abstract beings. They are
pseudo-life forms generated from those elements. Normally these spirits
would merely live calmly in the spirit world as beings that shape the world.
But because powerful magic has dragged them into Yendor's dungeon,
where space is distorted, they too become distorted spirits: monsters that
oppose humans.

They are great ones, boasting immense power as pure blocks of the
elements that sustain this world. When struck with swords or other weapons,
they may scatter intense heat. Some can even draw adventurers into their
bodies, dealing significant damage.
However, details are largely unknown since sightings of mad spirits are rare
outside of Yendor's dungeon.

slime mold, violet fungus, brown mold, yellow mold, green mold, red mold

In Yendor's dungeon, some moss and mushrooms grow. Occasionally, they
become abnormally dense. Notably, when moss giantizes, it will not attack
unless provoked. It will simply exist there.

However, if an adventurer attacks, they will receive a terrible counterattack. The
giant mosses have the ability to scatter their spores around them due to the
impact received. These spores include acidic ones that adhere to living skin.

Elemental. Slime

209

block-level machine translation prototype · page 211

And there are said to be things that emit abnormal heat. Therefore, it might
be the best method to ignore when you find mycelium. However, there are
